hirePage.title: Hire me
hirePage.subtitle:
I help companies design high-performing, accessible web and mobile applications tailored to their business needs.
Specialized in React, Next.js and Django, I build modern interfaces, robust architectures and automate workflows with n8n to reduce repetitive tasks and save teams time.
My areas of expertise: full stack development, UX, accessibility and automation.

process.discovery: We clarify the need, users, constraints and expected outcome.
process.prototype: I propose a concrete direction with screens, architecture and realistic priorities.
